creator: freebsdpr-20121114@billmail.scconsult.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #1)

No, I have not, and given the large number of patches in the 9.4.x port I'd expect it not to build without some need to rework one or more of them. 

It also appears that they have resumed distribution of source tarballs via SourceForge, although the operational source repo is at GitHub.
